entries.round: task:Fix the Docker build failure. 1. Modify 'Dockerfile' to be more resilient: use 'COPY go.mod ./' and then 'RUN go mod download' (it will create its own go.sum if missing). 2. Ensure 'go build' commands point correctly to './cmd/bot' and './cmd/watchdog'. 3. Update 'docker-compose.yml' if necessary to match the new container structure. 4. Verify all internal paths in the Go source files are correct after the module rename to 'liquidity-guard-bot'.
